title: Site Tracking

scriptDescription: In order to start tracking your customers are interacting with your site, you must first implement the script below so visitors to your site can receive notifications.
scriptInstruction: Copy the following lines of code and paste them in the last line before "head" element OR in to the Custom HTML tag type in your Google Tag Manager account.
scriptPurchaseInstruction: To start tracking purchases made as a result of your campaigns, please report the following using Javascirpt function below:
scriptPayAttention: * Pay attention, Site tracking will only work on sites with SSL certificate
purchaseInstructionTooltip: * Important! If you are collectiong and storing sensitive data, we highly recommend informing your clients
addFeatureTooltip: Want to set up tracking on your site? Talk to our sales team today at 03-5240290!
